cards.rules_text:
You may cast copies of these instants or sorceries from the command zone by paying their respective costs.
-
Malleate {1V}{1} Sorcery
Put a changeling counter on target permanent.
-
Chromatica {1V}{1V}{2} Instant
Add two mana of different colors not spent to cast this spell.
-
Spiraling Light {1V}{1V}{1V}{3} Sorcery
Move any number of counters from target creature you control to another target creature.
-
Spiraling Darkness {1V}{1V}{1V}{1V}{4} Instant
Draw a card.
-
Prismify {1V}{1V}{1V}{1V}{1V}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G} Sorcery
Put five +1/+1 counters on each of up to five target creatures.
